chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.welcomeDescription: I can help you find games, get recommendations based on your preferences, and answer questions about any game in our catalog.
chat.notVerified: Your account is not verified. Contact the administrator to get access to the AI assistant.

discover.title: AI Recommendations
discover.noResults: No games found. Try asking differently.

survey.signInRequiredTitle: Sign in to take the quiz

survey.resultMessage: Picks based on your current mood and previous answers.
